title: Breathing World: Dungeons
description: Small details that make the caves more dynamic.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NVaFnp94EPg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

When descending into a deep cave, the **air** may run out and the player will die from lack of **air**. To prevent this, you can wear a moss or paper mask, or fill up a bottle of air before descending into the cave. To craft a moss mask, you need to take 4 pieces of paper and 1 block of moss, and a paper mask can be made from moss and 3 pieces of paper, it will be 2 times worse than a moss mask, but if the moss mask is almost broken, you can use it to your advantage and create a paper mask. Masks allow you to retain **air**, but if it is almost gone, they will not be able to give you new **air**, for this you can fill up a bottle of air by pressing the right mouse button on the surface with an empty bottle in your hand. _To disable or enable this feature, use /bwd air true/false_

As you descend into the caves, **cave dust** begins to appear around you, adapting to the environment and adding a bit more dynamics to the cave. _To disable or enable this feature, use /bwd dust true/false_

When you dig a tunnel, with each stone you break, there is a chance that the tunnel will **collapse** on you. _To disable or enable this feature, use /bwd collapse true/false_

Sometimes caves may contain **enriched stone**, which can drop an iron or gold nugget, and **enriched deepslate**, which can drop a lapis lazuli part or a diamond fragment. _To disable or enable this feature, use /bwd enriched true/false_

From rotten flesh and bones, you can make **miner's soup**, which will allow you to eat without leaving the caves.

In caves you can find **stone** or **deepslate** with traces of ore, but without ore. _To disable or enable this feature, use /bwd ore true/false_
